queries.graph: policyresources | where type == 'microsoft.authorization/policyassignments' | extend displayName = tolower(tostring(properties.displayName)), definitionId = tolower(tostring(properties.policyDefinitionId)) | extend compliant = iff(displayName has 'machine configuration' or displayName has 'guest configuration' or definitionId has 'guestconfiguration' or definitionId has 'machineconfiguration', 1, 0) | project name, id, compliant
queries.description: Checks for Azure Policy assignments used to monitor VM security configuration drift.

queries.text: Use native PaaS service disaster recovery capabilities. Perform failover testing with these capabilities.
queries.graph: Resources | where type in~ ('microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts') | extend skuName = tostring(sku.name) | extend failoverRegions = array_length(properties.failoverPolicies) | extend geoRedundant = case(type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', iff(skuName in~ ('Standard_GRS', 'Standard_GZRS', 'Standard_RAGRS', 'Standard_RAGZRS'), true, false), type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', iff(coalesce(toint(failoverRegions), 0) > 1, true, false), false) | extend compliant = iff(geoRedundant, 1, 0) | project name, type, id, location, resourceGroup, skuName, geoRedundant, compliant
queries.description: Checks Storage Accounts and Cosmos DB accounts for geo-redundancy. Storage must use GRS/GZRS/RAGRS/RAGZRS SKUs; Cosmos DB must have multiple failover regions to support native PaaS disaster recovery capabilities.

queries.text: Use Azure-native backup capabilities, or an Azure-compatible, 3rd-party backup solution.
queries.graph: resources | where type in~ ('microsoft.recoveryservices/vaults','microsoft.dataprotection/backupvaults') | extend compliant = 1 | project name, id, type, compliant
queries.description: Checks for Azure-native backup vault resources.

queries.text: Add diagnostic settings to save WAF logs from application delivery services like Azure Front Door and Azure Application Gateway. Regularly review the logs to check for attacks and for false positive detections.
queries.graph: resources | where type == 'microsoft.insights/diagnosticsettings' | extend lowerId = tolower(id), logsText = tolower(tostring(properties.logs)) | where lowerId has '/microsoft.network/applicationgateways/' or lowerId has '/microsoft.cdn/profiles/' or lowerId has '/microsoft.network/frontdoors/' | extend compliant = iff(logsText has 'waf' or logsText has 'webapplicationfirewall', 1, 0) | project name, id, compliant
queries.description: Checks for diagnostic settings on application delivery resources that include WAF log categories.

queries.text: Send WAF logs from your application delivery services like Azure Front Door and Azure Application Gateway to Microsoft Sentinel. Detect attacks and integrate WAF telemetry into your overall Azure environment.
queries.graph: resources | where type == 'microsoft.insights/diagnosticsettings' | extend lowerId = tolower(id), workspaceId = tostring(properties.workspaceId) | where (lowerId has '/microsoft.network/applicationgateways/' or lowerId has '/microsoft.cdn/profiles/' or lowerId has '/microsoft.network/frontdoors/') and isnotempty(workspaceId) | extend compliant = 1 | project name, id, workspaceId, compliant
queries.description: Checks whether WAF-capable application delivery services send diagnostics to a Log Analytics workspace that could feed Microsoft Sentinel.

queries.text: Determine the incident response plan for Azure services before allowing it into production.
queries.reason: This is primarily a planning, documentation, or operational-process requirement rather than a directly queryable Azure resource configuration.

queries.text: Apply a zero-trust approach for access to the Azure platform.
queries.graph: Resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/virtualnetworks' | extend subnets = properties.subnets | mv-expand subnet = subnets | extend subnetName = tostring(subnet.name) | extend hasNsg = isnotempty(tostring(subnet.properties.networkSecurityGroup.id)) | where subnetName !in~ ('GatewaySubnet', 'AzureFirewallSubnet', 'AzureFirewallManagementSubnet', 'AzureBastionSubnet', 'RouteServerSubnet') | extend compliant = iff(hasNsg, 1, 0) | project name, id, location, resourceGroup, subnetName, hasNsg, compliant
queries.description: Checks workload subnets (excluding reserved system subnets) for an attached Network Security Group. NSG coverage on all workload subnets is a core network-layer control in a zero-trust access approach for the Azure platform.

queries.text: Use Azure Key Vault to store your secrets and credentials.
queries.graph: resources | where type == 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' | extend compliant = 1 | project name, id, location, compliant
queries.description: Checks for Azure Key Vault resources used to store secrets and credentials.

queries.text: Provision Azure Key Vault with the soft delete and purge policies enabled to allow retention protection for deleted objects.
queries.graph: resources | where type == 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' | extend softDelete = properties.enableSoftDelete, purgeProtection = properties.enablePurgeProtection | extend compliant = iff(softDelete == true and purgeProtection == true, 1, 0) | project name, id, compliant
queries.description: Checks whether Key Vault soft delete and purge protection are both enabled.

queries.text: Follow a least privilege model by assigning just-in-time eligible RBAC roles for operators, administrators, and other user accounts requiring privileged access to Key Vault using Privileged Identity Management (PIM).
queries.reason: This requirement depends on organizational intent, operational practice, or external context that Azure Resource Graph cannot validate directly.

queries.text: Automate the certificate management and renewal process with public certificate authorities to ease administration.
queries.graph: Resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults/certificates' | extend lifetimeActions = properties.policy.lifetimeActions | extend compliant = iff(array_length(lifetimeActions) > 0, 1, 0) | project name, id, resourceGroup, compliant
queries.description: Checks Key Vault certificates for defined lifetime actions such as auto-renewal triggers. Certificates without lifetime actions are at risk of unexpected expiry.

queries.text: Establish an automated process for key and certificate rotation.
queries.graph: Resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults/keys' | extend rotationPolicy = properties.rotationPolicy | extend compliant = iff(isnotempty(rotationPolicy) and tostring(rotationPolicy) != '{}', 1, 0) | project name, id, resourceGroup, compliant
queries.description: Checks Key Vault keys for a defined rotation policy. Keys without a rotation policy require manual rotation, leaving cryptographic material in use longer than recommended.

queries.text: Enable private endpoints to control access to the key vault, configure service endpoints and the vault firewall if private endpoints are not applicable
queries.graph: resources | where type == 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' | extend publicNetworkAccess = tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess), defaultAction = tostring(properties.networkAcls.defaultAction), privateEndpointCount = toint(coalesce(array_length(properties.privateEndpointConnections), 0)) | extend compliant = iff(privateEndpointCount > 0 or publicNetworkAccess == 'Disabled' or defaultAction == 'Deny', 1, 0) | project name, id, privateEndpointCount, publicNetworkAccess, defaultAction, compliant
queries.description: Checks whether Key Vault is protected through private endpoints or restrictive network ACL/firewall settings.

queries.text: Use the platform-central Azure Monitor Log Analytics workspace to audit key, certificate, and secret usage within each instance of Key Vault.
queries.graph: resources | where type == 'microsoft.insights/diagnosticsettings' | extend lowerId = tolower(id), workspaceId = tostring(properties.workspaceId) | where lowerId has '/microsoft.keyvault/vaults/' | extend compliant = iff(isnotempty(workspaceId), 1, 0) | project name, id, workspaceId, compliant
queries.description: Checks whether Key Vault diagnostic settings send logs to a Log Analytics workspace.

queries.text: Delegate Key Vault instantiation and privileged access and use Azure Policy to enforce a consistent compliant configuration.
queries.graph: policyresources | where type == 'microsoft.authorization/policyassignments' | extend displayName = tolower(tostring(properties.displayName)), definitionId = tolower(tostring(properties.policyDefinitionId)) | extend compliant = iff(displayName has 'key vault' or definitionId has 'keyvault', 1, 0) | project name, id, compliant
queries.description: Checks for Azure Policy assignments targeting Key Vault configuration or governance.

queries.text: Default to Microsoft-managed keys for principal encryption functionality and use customer-managed keys when required.
queries.graph: Resources | where type in~ ('microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases', 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts') | extend keySource = tostring(properties.encryption.keySource) | extend usesCMK = iff(keySource =~ 'Microsoft.Keyvault', true, false) | extend compliant = iff(usesCMK == false, 1, 0) | project name, type, id, resourceGroup, location, keySource, usesCMK, compliant
queries.description: Checks storage, database, and AI resources for their encryption key source. Resources using customer-managed keys (CMK) are flagged for review; Microsoft-managed keys are the recommended default unless CMK is explicitly required.

queries.text: Do you have a sovereignty requirement to use customer-managed keys?
queries.reason: This requirement depends on organizational intent, operational practice, or external context that Azure Resource Graph cannot validate directly.

queries.text: If you bring your own keys, ensure they are supported across all required services.
queries.graph: Resources | where type in~ ('microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases', 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts', 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters') | extend keySource = tostring(properties.encryption.keySource) | extend cmkEnabled = iff(keySource =~ 'Microsoft.Keyvault', true, false) | extend compliant = 1 | project name, type, id, location, resourceGroup, cmkEnabled, compliant
queries.description: Inventories key PaaS services and shows which have customer-managed key encryption enabled. Use this list to verify BYOK is consistently applied across all required services.

queries.text: For Sovereign Landing Zone, use Azure Key Vault managed HSM to store your secrets and credentials.
queries.graph: resources | where type == 'microsoft.keyvault/managedhsms' | extend compliant = 1 | project name, id, location, compliant
queries.description: Checks for Azure Key Vault Managed HSM resources.

queries.text: Use Microsoft Entra ID reporting capabilities to generate access control audit reports.
queries.reason: This requirement depends on organizational intent, operational practice, or external context that Azure Resource Graph cannot validate directly.

queries.text: Export Azure activity logs to Azure Monitor Logs for long-term data retention. Export to Azure Storage for long-term storage beyond 12 years, if necessary.
queries.graph: resources | where type == 'microsoft.insights/diagnosticsettings' | extend lowerId = tolower(id), workspaceId = tostring(properties.workspaceId), storageAccountId = tostring(properties.storageAccountId) | where lowerId startswith '/subscriptions/' and lowerId !has '/resourcegroups/' and lowerId has '/providers/microsoft.insights/diagnosticsettings/' | extend compliant = iff(isnotempty(workspaceId) or isnotempty(storageAccountId), 1, 0) | project name, id, workspaceId, storageAccountId, compliant
queries.description: Checks whether subscription-level activity logs are exported to Log Analytics and/or Azure Storage.

queries.text: Enable Defender Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) plan for all resources in addition to the on-by-default Foundational plan for advanced security posture features .
queries.graph: securityresources | where type == 'microsoft.security/pricings' | where name == 'CloudPosture' | extend tier = tostring(properties.pricingTier) | extend compliant = iff(tier == 'Standard', 1, 0) | project name, id, compliant
queries.description: Checks whether the Defender for Cloud CSPM plan is enabled at Standard tier.

queries.text: Enable a Microsoft Defender for Servers plan for all cloud servers.
queries.graph: securityresources | where type == 'microsoft.security/pricings' | where name == 'VirtualMachines' | extend tier = tostring(properties.pricingTier) | extend compliant = iff(tier == 'Standard', 1, 0) | project name, id, compliant
queries.description: Checks whether Defender for Servers is enabled at Standard tier.

queries.text: Enable Defender Cloud Workload Protection Plans for Azure Resources on all subscriptions.
queries.graph: securityresources | where type == 'microsoft.security/pricings' | extend tier = tostring(properties.pricingTier) | extend compliant = iff(tier == 'Standard', 1, 0) | project name, id, compliant
queries.description: Checks Microsoft Defender pricing plans across subscriptions and resource scopes.

queries.text: Enable Endpoint Protection on IaaS Servers.
queries.graph: securityresources | where type == 'microsoft.security/assessments' | extend assessmentName = tostring(properties.displayName), statusCode = tostring(properties.status.code) | where assessmentName has 'Endpoint protection' or assessmentName has 'Microsoft Defender for Endpoint' | extend compliant = iff(statusCode == 'Healthy', 1, 0) | project name, id, assessmentName, compliant
queries.description: Checks Defender for Cloud assessments related to endpoint protection on servers.

queries.text: Monitor base operating system patching drift via Azure Monitor Logs and Defender for Cloud.
queries.graph: securityresources | where type == 'microsoft.security/assessments' | extend assessmentName = tostring(properties.displayName), statusCode = tostring(properties.status.code) | where assessmentName has 'system updates should be installed' or assessmentName has 'missing system updates' | extend compliant = iff(statusCode == 'Healthy', 1, 0) | project name, id, assessmentName, compliant
queries.description: Checks Defender for Cloud assessments related to missing system updates as a proxy for patching drift.

queries.text: Connect default resource configurations to a centralized Azure Monitor Log Analytics workspace.
queries.graph: resources | where type == 'microsoft.insights/diagnosticsettings' | extend workspaceId = tostring(properties.workspaceId) | extend compliant = iff(isnotempty(workspaceId), 1, 0) | project name, id, workspaceId, compliant
queries.description: Checks whether resources have diagnostic settings sending data to a Log Analytics workspace.

queries.text: For Sovereign Landing Zone, enforce customer‑controlled access to Microsoft support operations by enabling Customer Lockbox for all supported Azure and Microsoft 365 services.
queries.graph: policyresources | where type =~ 'microsoft.authorization/policyassignments' | extend defId = tolower(tostring(properties.policyDefinitionId)) | extend displayName = tolower(tostring(properties.displayName)) | extend compliant = iff(defId has 'lockbox' or displayName has 'lockbox', 1, 0) | project name, scope=tostring(properties.scope), displayName, compliant
queries.description: Checks for Customer Lockbox policy assignments that enforce customer-controlled access to Microsoft support operations, as required for Sovereign Landing Zone environments.

queries.text: Use an Azure Event Grid-based solution for log-oriented, real-time alerts.
queries.graph: resources | where type has 'microsoft.eventgrid' and type has 'eventsubscriptions' | extend compliant = 1 | project name, id, type, compliant
queries.description: Checks for Event Grid event subscription resources that can support real-time alert fan-out.

queries.text: Enable secure transfer to storage accounts.
queries.graph: resources | where type == 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' | extend httpsOnly = properties.supportsHttpsTrafficOnly | extend compliant = iff(httpsOnly == true, 1, 0) | project name, id, compliant
queries.description: Checks whether secure transfer (HTTPS only) is enabled on storage accounts.

queries.text: Enable container soft delete for the storage account to recover a deleted container and its contents.
queries.graph: resources | where type == 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/blobservices' | extend containerSoftDelete = properties.containerDeleteRetentionPolicy.enabled | extend compliant = iff(containerSoftDelete == true, 1, 0) | project name, id, compliant
queries.description: Checks whether container soft delete is enabled on blob services.

queries.text: Are TLS version requirements enforced through Azure Policy?
queries.graph: policyresources | where type == 'microsoft.authorization/policyassignments' | extend displayName = tolower(tostring(properties.displayName)), definitionId = tolower(tostring(properties.policyDefinitionId)) | extend compliant = iff(displayName has 'tls' or displayName has 'minimum tls' or definitionId has 'tls' or definitionId has 'minimumtlsversion', 1, 0) | project name, id, compliant
queries.description: Checks for policy assignments that enforce TLS or minimum TLS version requirements.
